strategy.key_message: You're one of our most valued guests

generated_emails.subject: We miss you, Yafet! It's been 5433 days...
generated_emails.body:
Dear Yafet Getachew,

It's been 5433 days since your last stay with us. We remember you celebrated your nan with us.

You're one of our most valued guests.

As a Regular guest who has spent $22,233.00 with us, we're offering you a special 25% discount on your next stay. Your preferred deluxe room is ready for you. Our nan team can't wait to welcome you back.

Claim your exclusive offer

Warm regards,
Luxury Hotel Team

P.S. This exclusive offer is available for a limited time. Don't miss out!
